markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games has confirmed Grand Theft Auto VI’s release for November 19, 2026, following multiple delays that shifted the title from 2025 into late 2026. With Trailer 2 already live and summer marketing campaigns now underway, attention has turned to which major cultural, tech, and geopolitical milestones could land in the remaining window. Traders are closely tracking OpenAI’s next model cycle for potential GPT-6 timing, major music drop schedules such as Drake’s Iceman project, and any Russia-Ukraine developments, as these represent high-visibility events that historically align with blockbuster entertainment releases. The compressed marketing window and ongoing industry focus on the game’s performance metrics continue to shape expectations around what else may unfold beforehand.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Harvey Weinstein’s New York retrial has produced split verdicts and multiple mistrials on remaining charges, leaving the Manhattan case in procedural limbo ahead of a June 2026 hearing on whether prosecutors will pursue yet another trial. The disgraced producer, now 74 and facing documented health challenges including cancer and diabetes while held at Rikers, already carries a consecutive 16-year California sentence from 2023 that continues to anchor his incarceration regardless of New York outcomes. Traders appear to weigh the repeated jury deadlocks, appeals prospects, and his advanced age and frailty as dominant factors favoring limited or no additional prison time beyond existing terms, with upcoming court dates likely to test whether the stalled New York prosecution can still produce meaningful sentencing impact.

markets.question: Will the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Carolina Hurricanes hold the edge in this Stanley Cup Final matchup thanks to their historic 12-1 playoff run through the Eastern Conference, including a decisive five-game series win over the Montreal Canadiens, while maintaining strong regular-season form with 113 points and elite defensive structure. Home-ice advantage for Game 1 and overall roster depth further support trader consensus around their 58.5% implied probability. The Vegas Golden Knights counter with momentum from a sweep of the Colorado Avalanche in the West and a 19-4-1 stretch under head coach John Tortorella, bolstered by strong penalty-kill performance and contributions from stars like Mitch Marner. This sets up a competitive best-of-seven series where recent form and special-teams execution will heavily influence the outcome.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment positions the San Antonio Spurs as the clear favorite for the 2026 NBA Champion at 64.3% implied probability, ahead of the New York Knicks at 35.8%, based on their respective paths through the playoffs and current series dynamics. The Spurs have leveraged superior depth, home-court edge, and consistent regular-season form to establish this edge, while the Knicks' Eastern Conference run highlights strong defensive play and roster resilience despite a tougher travel schedule. Recent game results and injury reports continue to shape adjustments in this matchup, with historical Finals patterns and remaining schedule factors informing the consensus pricing.

markets.question: Will MegaETH perform an airdrop by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if MegaETH launches a token and performs an airdrop by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market "locked" tokens or non-swappable tokens will not suffice to resolve this market to "Yes". Airdrops of NFTs will not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market is on-chain information and official information from MegaETH, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

events.title: MegaETH airdrop by...?
events.description: this is a market on MegaETH airdrop

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The tight clustering of implied probabilities among France, Spain, England, Portugal, Argentina, and Brazil reflects the exceptional depth and recent form across these squads as the 2026 tournament approaches. Multiple European sides bring balanced attacking options, experienced midfield control, and defensive organization honed in recent Nations League and qualifier campaigns, while South American contenders rely on star talent and proven knockout resilience. Minor injury concerns, including Spain’s Lamine Yamal and France’s William Saliba, have introduced slight uncertainty without shifting the overall hierarchy. Favorable group draws and strong pre-tournament preparation further compress the gap, leaving traders to weigh marginal edges in squad versatility and momentum heading into group play.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping maintains firm control over the Chinese Communist Party, state institutions, and the Central Military Commission as of mid-2026, with no designated successor and no visible elite challenges or institutional mechanisms for removal. Recent military leadership changes have further centralized authority under his oversight, while expectations point to a fourth term at the 21st Party Congress in late 2027. Official activities, including his New Year address and directives on the 15th Five-Year Plan for 2026-2030, underscore his active leadership role without signs of transition. Traders' 93.3% implied probability on "No" reflects this sustained dominance and the absence of developments that would indicate an earlier exit.

markets.question: Will Gavin Newsom win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

events.title: Democratic Presidential Nominee 2028

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

eventMetadata.context_description: Gavin Newsom holds the leading position in trader consensus for the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination at 25.1 percent, driven by his California governorship, term-limited status that frees him for a national bid, extensive fundraising network, and repeated high-profile criticism of the Trump administration. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez follows at 10.4 percent on the strength of progressive voter mobilization, while Kamala Harris sits at 8.3 percent reflecting prior nomination experience. The remainder of the field stays fragmented below 6 percent each. Key differentiators include executive governing records versus ideological positioning and national name recognition, with potential consolidation likely influenced by 2026 midterm outcomes, early endorsements, and shifts in polling among key voting blocs such as Black voters in Southern states. No candidates have formally declared.
